name: HubSpot for Startups
summary: HubSpot for Startups provides eligible startups with discounts on HubSpot software.
benefits: 90% off year one (for startups with Pre-seed, Seed or Series A funding, affiliated with an approved HubSpot partner, or have raised verified venture funding)
30% off year one (for startups associated with an approved entrepreneurial organization)
eligibility: Startups with Pre-seed, Seed or Series A funding
Affiliated with an approved HubSpot for Startups partner
Associated with one of HubSpot's approved entrepreneurial organizations
